Continue
Check a different address

T-Mobile 5G Home Internet

Get the full 5G unlimited home internet experience at a great value.  

Advanced & unlimited internet coverage

  • Includes high-performance premium 5G Gateway with our fastest speeds.

  • Wi-Fi Mesh Access Point provides expanded coverage, a smoother experience, and increased speed in more places throughout the home. 

Delivered via 5G cellular network; speeds vary due to factors affecting cellular networks, including data prioritization.​​

Worry-free tech support

  • 24/7 interactive live assistance with video support allows you to show a virtual expert what you need help with, whether it’s setting up a smart thermostat or troubleshooting your computer.

  • Utilize optional screen and camera sharing support while chatting with a real person. 

​​Third party terms apply.​

Built-in security

Advanced Cyber Security protection proactively monitors and helps block threats on your home network and connected devices.

Streaming perks

  • Get Hulu (With Ads) ON US for Internet. Stream full seasons of exclusive series, plus current episodes, Hulu Originals, hit movies, and more.

  • Paramount+ Essential Plan for Internet ON US lets you stream over 40,000 episodes and hit movies, plus exclusive originals, live sports, and more. 

T-Mobile 5G Small Business Internet

Get the full 5G unlimited small business internet experience at a great value.

Advanced & unlimited internet coverage

  • Includes high-performance premium 5G Gateway with our fastest speeds.

  • Wi-Fi Mesh Access Point provides expanded coverage, a smoother experience, and increased speed in more places throughout your business.

Delivered via 5G cellular network; speeds vary due to factors affecting cellular networks, including data prioritization.​​

Worry-free tech support

  • 24/7 interactive live assistance with video support allows you to show a virtual expert what you need help with, whether it’s setting up a smart thermostat or troubleshooting your computer.

  • Utilize optional screen and camera sharing support while chatting with a real person.​​

​​Third party terms apply.​

Built-in security

Advanced Cyber Security protection proactively monitors and helps block threats on your small business network and connected devices.

Streaming perks

  • Get Hulu (With Ads) ON US for Internet. Stream full seasons of exclusive series, plus current episodes, Hulu Originals, hit movies, and more.

  • Paramount+ Essential Plan for Internet ON US lets you stream over 40,000 episodes and hit movies, plus exclusive originals, live sports, and more.

T-Mobile Fiber

There’s a lot to love about T‑Mobile Fiber, and we’re making it easy for you to switch.  

Supercharge your bandwidth on a 100% fiber-optic network.
Fiber-optic lines send data via light signals, giving your home internet warp-speed capabilities. This means you—and others in your home—can really put your devices to work, all at once.

Put your Wi-Fi in hyperdrive with a powerful Wi-Fi 6 router.
For no added cost, we’ll hook you up with one of the fastest Wi-Fi routers on the market with coverage of up to 2,000 square feet.

Enjoy simple, competitive pricing.
Our internet plans are straightforward with no BS. With T‑Mobile Fiber there are no annual contracts or additional costs for equipment or installation. Just stellar service.

Feel confident with home internet you can trust.
Our ultra-low latency and 24/7 network monitoring significantly reduce bouts with lag, meaning you get smooth video connections and lightning-fast file transfers.

This is the easiest switch you’ll ever make.

We have all the speed you need for TV streaming.Our gigabit internet supports dozens of devices at once. That means you can drop cable TV and use your favorite streaming service instead, and save money in the process.

We don’t ask you to commit.
We don’t lock you into a long-term contract. We believe in our service and that you’ll love being a T‑Mobile Fiber customer. But you can cancel service at any time.

Get installed in a flash.
Just set up an appointment to activate your service and we’ll quickly have you up and running—with no additional charges for installation or equipment.

T-Mobile Home Internet Backup

Not your main squeeze, but we show up when it counts.

Home Internet Backup is our simple way to keep your whole home connected—automatically switching to T-Mobile's network when your primary internet goes down.

Delivered via T-Mobile's 5G and 4G LTE cellular network; speeds vary due to factors affecting cellular networks.

Our Backup plan features:

  • Simple setup in 15 minutes or less.
  • 100 hours of data per billing cycle.
  • Three Backup Passes per year, each adding an extra 100 hours of data at no additional cost.
  • No annual contracts or equipment fees.

Exclusions like taxes & fees apply.

T-Mobile AWAY™

Introducing AWAY™ A new Wi-Fi solution for life on the go. 

AWAY™ is our beyond-the-home internet plan that gives you the freedom to stream, work, and play where adventure leads you—all on America’s largest 5G network. 

Delivered via T-Mobile’s 5G and 4G LTE cellular network; speeds vary due to factors affecting cellular networks.

Our AWAY™ plan features:

  • Simple setup in 15 minutes or less.​

  • The ability for passengers to stay connected in motion.

  • The capability to connect up to 64 devices at a time.

  • Pause up to 90 days, twice a year, for $10 a month.

  • Our 5G Wi-Fi Gateway is included at no additional cost, and there are zero monthly equipment fees.

  • A great price, guaranteed for 5 years. 

​​Exclusions like taxes & fees apply.​

T-Mobile Small Business Internet Backup

Not your main squeeze, but we show up when it counts.

Small Business Internet Backup is our simple way to keep your small business connected—automatically switching to T-Mobile's network when your primary internet goes down.

Delivered via T-Mobile's 5G and 4G LTE cellular network; speeds vary due to factors affecting cellular networks.

Our Small Business Internet Backup plan features:

  • Simple setup in 15 minutes or less.
  • 130GB of data per month.
  • 130GB of free extra data, up to 3 times a year.
  • No annual contracts or equipment fees.

Exclusions like taxes & fees apply.

T-Mobile AWAY™

Introducing AWAY™ A new Wi-Fi solution for life on the go. 

AWAY™ is our beyond-the-business internet plan that keeps you connected and productive wherever your journey takes you—all on America’s largest 5G network.

Delivered via T-Mobile’s 5G and 4G LTE cellular network; speeds vary due to factors affecting cellular networks.

Our AWAY™ plan features:

  • Simple setup in 15 minutes or less.​

  • The ability for passengers to stay connected in motion.

  • The capability to connect up to 64 devices at a time.

  • Pause up to 90 days, twice a year, for $10 a month.

  • Our 5G Wi-Fi Gateway is included at no additional cost, and there are zero monthly equipment fees.

  • A great price, guaranteed for 5 years. 

​​Exclusions like taxes & fees apply.​

Update this address from your account settings.

Complete your order first

Check out now, then come back and purchase Fiber internet.

Money Back: Limited-time; subject to change. Register code within 30 days of activating qualifying new Internet line ($100: Rely; $100: Amplified; $200: All-In). If you have cancelled Internet lines in past 90 days, you may need to reactivate them first. Up to $300 via virtual prepaid Mastercard; use online or in-store via accepted mobile payment apps; no cash access & expires in 6 months. The Virtual Prepaid Mastercard is issued by Sunrise Banks N.A., Member FDIC, pursuant to a license from Mastercard International Incorporated. Mastercard is a registered trademark, and the circles design is a trademark of Mastercard International Incorporated. This card may be used everywhere Debit Mastercard is accepted. Registration, activation, acceptance, or use of this card constitutes acceptance of the terms and conditions stated in the Prepaid Card Agreement. This promotion is not associated, sponsored, or endorsed by Mastercard or Sunrise Banks N.A. Lines must be active and in good standing when card is issued. Max 1/account. May not be combined with some offers, discounts, or promotions.

During congestion, customers on this plan may notice speeds lower than other customers and further reduction if using >1.2TB/mo., due to data prioritization. After monthly allotment, data at up to 128 Kbps. For use at multiple locations on T-Mobile network; not for extended use in the same location; no off-net roaming. $35 device connection charge due at sale. Plus taxes & fees for accounts currently paying for a T-Mobile wireless line with additional taxes & fees: Monthly Regulatory Programs & Telco Recovery Fees totaling up to $1.60 per line, and federal and local surcharges apply. See Broadband Facts at T-Mobile.com. Credit approval required. Return gateway undamaged or pay up to $370. Video streaming resolution depends on available speeds. For best performance, leave video streaming applications at their default resolution setting. Not compatible with some live TV streaming services. AutoPay Pricing for lines 1–8 on account. AutoPay discount requires bank account or debit card, otherwise $5 more/line/month. May not be reflected on first bill. Coverage not available in some areas. Network Management: Service may be slowed, suspended, terminated, or restricted for misuse, abnormal use, interference with our network or ability to provide quality service to other users. See T-Mobile.com/OpenInternet for details. See Terms and Conditions (including arbitration provision) at www.T-Mobile.com for additional information.

Gateway will be shipped

The T-Mobile 5G gateway for this plan is not currently in-stock at this location and will be shipped to you.

Adding home internet will remove all items in cart

You can’t add home internet when doing an upgrade. You’ll need to make two separate transactions.

Adding small business internet will remove all items in cart

You can’t add small business internet when doing an upgrade. You’ll need to make two separate transactions.

Gateway will be shipped

The T-Mobile 5G gateway for this plan is not currently in-stock at this location and will be shipped to you

Continue and replace home internet?

You already have a home internet plan in your cart. Continuing will replace your current selections.

Continue and replace small business internet?

You already have a small business internet plan in your cart. Continuing will replace your current selections.

Hello! Want to stay logged in?

To keep your accounts safe, you'll be automatically logged out in: 

Share your screen while on a call or in store

Get guided support from an Expert in real time

  • For your security, personal info, tabs, and notifications are automatically hidden.
  • You can stop screen sharing at any time.
  • Experts can only see what’s on T-Mobile.com.
  • Don’t use screen share while driving or in any situation where it's unsafe to focus on your screen.

By clicking 'Accept and continue,' you are consenting to allow the Expert to view your screen for assisted navigation. This session may be recorded. To learn more, please visit the  T-Mobile Privacy Notice.

Next: Generate a code to share with your Expert

Share this code with your Expert

code

Once your code has been successfully entered by your Expert, this window will close and continue to the session.

Allow screen sharing with your Expert?

Personal and sensitive data is hidden for your security and privacy.

End your session?

Ending your session will stop sharing your screen, but will not end your call.

Your session has ended

Your screen is no longer being shared with your Expert.

You are already in an active session
